name: Boys' Dorm
description:
Harassment, groping, and possibly rape.

[FemPOV] It's time for college life. You're a bit nervous when it comes to all the new people you're about to meet, and the initial struggles of finding your way around. Those factors pale in comparison to the news you're given when it comes to where you'll be staying.

Apparently, a mix up during enrollment has filled the woman's dorm to capacity, leaving you outside wanting in. The only ridiculous solution the staff could come up with, is sending you to the only vacant residence they had left, and it's in the men's dorm.

The thought of ditching this semester crossed your mind, but you're not convinced you'd ever come back if you left, so you reluctantly accept your fate.

You are definitely the center of attention when your new roommate, Matt, finally let's you into the dorm room. While taking a nap in an attempt to get off sequence with the boys schedule, you're awaken by an unwanted facial.

_____________________________

While playing around with other bots along this same principle, I had this idea come to mind. Enjoy!

Two of the AI may be quite aggressive.

Features a lengthy intro.
creator: Rythyn
